calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jul-26-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Denise Doucette.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: The Education Resources Institure, Inc.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Sung-Hoon Choi as follows:
Damages $58,053.78
Prejudgment Interest $24,553.55
Attorney Fees $2,825.00
Costs $426.95, for a total of $85,859.28
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove-Up.
